<!-- Generated by StrongAIAutoDoc 20260524 -->

This directory contains foundational utilities for GuardDog-style tooling: consistent error types, safe repository file scanning/loading, console-backed logging, and token counting for LLM prompt budgeting. The modules are designed as small, reusable building blocks with minimal coupling: `errors.ts` defines domain-specific failures, `fileSystem.ts` provides robust path validation and context file reading, `logger.ts` standardizes CLI logging behavior, and `tokenCounter.ts` estimates token usage via tiktoken encodings.

```mermaid
C4Component
title GuardDog Utilities - Component View

%% External dependencies
System_Ext(NodeFS, "Node.js fs/promises", "Async filesystem I/O")
System_Ext(NodePath, "Node.js path", "Path normalization and relative path handling")
System_Ext(Minimatch, "minimatch", "Glob matching for ignore patterns")
System_Ext(NodeConsole, "Node.js console", "stdout/stderr output")
System_Ext(NodeProcessEnv, "process.env", "Environment variables for configuration")
System_Ext(TiktokenLib, "tiktoken", "Token encoding and counting")

%% Directory boundary
Boundary(GuardDogDir, "Directory: core utilities") {

  Component(Errors, "errors.ts", "TypeScript module", "Defines GuardDogError base class and specific error subclasses")
  Component(FileSystem, "fileSystem.ts", "TypeScript module", "Repository scanning, ignore filtering, safe text loading, secret redaction")
  Component(Logger, "logger.ts", "TypeScript module", "ILogger and ConsoleLogger with level routing and debug gating")
  Component(TokenCounter, "tokenCounter.ts", "TypeScript module", "Encoding model resolution, encoder lifecycle, token counting")
}

%% Internal relationships
Rel(FileSystem, Errors, "Throws", "InvalidParameterError")

%% External relationships
Rel(FileSystem, NodeFS, "Uses", "readFile/writeFile, stat, readdir")
Rel(FileSystem, NodePath, "Uses", "resolve, normalize, relative, join")
Rel(FileSystem, Minimatch, "Uses", "match ignore patterns")

Rel(Logger, NodeConsole, "Uses", "log/warn/error")
Rel(Logger, NodeProcessEnv, "Reads", "GUARDDOG_DEBUG")

Rel(TokenCounter, TiktokenLib, "Uses", "encoding_for_model, get_encoding")
Rel(TokenCounter, NodeProcessEnv, "Reads", "OPENAI_MODEL")
```

### Key components
`errors.ts` supplies a small hierarchy of GuardDog-specific `Error` subclasses, enabling consistent categorization (invalid parameter/operation/state and connection failures) across callers. `fileSystem.ts` is the most operational module: it validates repository roots, walks directories while honoring ignore patterns, and reads small, non-binary context files with secret redaction; it signals invalid inputs via `InvalidParameterError` from `errors.ts`. `logger.ts` standardizes CLI output with `ILogger` and `ConsoleLogger`, routing levels to stdout/stderr and enabling debug logs only when `GUARDDOG_DEBUG=1`. `tokenCounter.ts` integrates with `tiktoken` to resolve encoding models (optionally from `OPENAI_MODEL`), create/free encoders, and count tokens for budgeting.
